description: Subcommand nesting: command trees with recursive dispatch, flag propagation, nested help/completions

tasks.title: Add propagate field to FlagSchema + .propagate() on FlagBuilder
tasks.description: Add `propagate: boolean` to FlagSchema. Add `.propagate()` on FlagBuilder. Follows .deprecated() pattern.

tasks.title: Add commands to CommandSchema + .command() on CommandBuilder + group() factory
tasks.description: Add `commands: readonly ErasedCommand[]` to CommandSchema. Add `.command()` to CommandBuilder. Add `group()` factory. Relocate ErasedCommand to shared location.

tasks.title: Implement propagated flag collection with ancestor walk and shadowing
tasks.description: Pure function: walk command path ancestors, collect flags where propagate===true, child override shadows parent.

tasks.title: Implement recursive command dispatch in CLIBuilder.execute()
tasks.description: Replace single-level dispatch with recursive walk. Consume argv segments as command names. Merge propagated flags before resolution. Extract to cli/dispatch.ts.

tasks.title: Update help formatter for nested command groups
tasks.description: formatHelp() gains 'Commands:' section for groups. Usage line adapts. Root help handles groups alongside leaves.

tasks.title: Update bash/zsh completion generators for nested command trees
tasks.description: Bash/zsh generators walk full tree depth. Include propagated flags in child completion.

tasks.title: Scope 'did you mean?' suggestions to current command level
tasks.description: findClosestCommand() searches within current scope, not global command list.

tasks.title: Add testkit support for nested command tree scenarios
tasks.description: Integration tests for nested dispatch via CLIBuilder.execute(). Propagated flags, group help, error cases.
